content: Decision (Ori, 2026-07-02): merge culture-core back into culture by copy-paste — nobody should consume culture-core standalone, so the two-package split is pure overhead. Keep the culture_core import namespace and the alias finder (zero import churn); culture ships both packages and bumps to 14.0.0. Absorb leg: agentculture/culture#462. Retirement leg (blocked on 462): agentculture/culture-core#28. Capability follow-ups after the merge: pin guild-cli and forward provisioning verbs (mirror the steward-cli forwarding pattern), keep relationships via steward-cli, add a drift guard for remaining external pins. Decision trail: devague frame culture-is-one-coherent-long-term-maintainable-sys. Key evidence: culture pinned culture-core~=0.5.0 while the engine was at 0.17.0 — pin drift was the split's recurring cost.
